title: A Good day starts with Good Coffee
description: BUSINESS NEWS - At Object Café, we...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Object Café, we believe every day should begin with warmth, flavour, and connection. Since taking over management on 3 March 2025 we've been pouring our hearts into crafting a space that feels like home – where your favourite coffee, cocktails, meals and sweet treats come with a side of joy and genuine smiles.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Object Café, we believe every day should begin with warmth, flavour, and connection. Since taking over management on 3 March 2025 we've been pouring our hearts into crafting a space that feels like home – where your favourite coffee, cocktails, meals and sweet treats come with a side of joy and genuine smiles."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our menu is a love letter to comfort and creativity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you're catching up with friends, savouring a solo moment, or trying something new just because - you'll find that every plate and drink is made with passion.","html":"Whether you're catching up with friends, savouring a solo moment, or trying something new just because - you'll find that every plate and drink is made with passion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The music hums softly in the background, the atmosphere invites you to breathe, and our team is always ready to welcome you.","html":"The music hums softly in the background, the atmosphere invites you to breathe, and our team is always ready to welcome you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"So step away from the hustle, bring your stories and goals, and find a seat at our table.","html":"So step away from the hustle, bring your stories and goals, and find a seat at our table."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Object Café we serve more than just food-we serve moments that make life delicious.","html":"At Object Café we serve more than just food-we serve moments that make life delicious."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Please take a moment to cast your vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/best-of-mossel-bay-vote/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: A Good day starts with Good Coffee
